title: Verify every candidate commit crash window
steps: Inject process termination and receipt failures before attempting, after attempting and before the LEDGER call, after LEDGER commit and before receipt durability, after terminal receipt durability, and between candidates; repeat resume and concurrent commit attempts.
expected: One batch lock serializes writers; resume reuses exact frozen requests and keys; every candidate converges to one terminal outcome or explicit conflict; no second canonical transaction is created; unsafe failures stop the frontier.
